hero.subtitle: 15 years leading Creator Economy strategies for Budweiser, Betfair, Ambev, Jellysmack, and A+E Networks across Latin America.

experienceRoles.directorDigitalContent: Director of Digital Content, Influencer Marketing & Talent

about.heading: Caio Fochetto
about.p1: Creator Economy and Performance Marketing leader with 15+ years connecting brand, culture, and measurable results. I specialize in translating audience behavior into strategy — combining data, creativity, and platform intelligence.
about.p2: I built and led influencer marketing operations for brands like Budweiser, Betfair, and Ambev at Octagon, and scaled Jellysmack's operations across Latin America from the ground up. Before that, I spent nearly 8 years at A+E Networks managing digital platforms for HISTORY, A&E, Lifetime, and Formula E.
about.p3: I work at the intersection of creativity, data, and culture — where global brands need to speak to real communities.

footer.ctaDescription: Open to opportunities in Creator Economy, Performance Marketing, and marketing leadership.

history-ae-digital-transformation.title: Digital Platforms Monetization: +634% Growth
history-ae-digital-transformation.description: Content distribution and monetization strategy across three major brands' digital platforms, using social channels as revenue and audience growth drivers.
history-ae-digital-transformation.challenge: Expand digital audiences and unlock new catalog monetization opportunities in an increasingly fragmented consumption landscape, where traditional platforms were losing ground to social.
history-ae-digital-transformation.solution: Strategic use of social channels as distribution platforms — publishing selected episodes and editorial cuts within specific time windows to attract new audiences and convert them into platform revenue.
insights: Social platforms can be monetization channels as effective as traditional broadcast
Strategic content windowing drives organic discovery and revenue simultaneously
Multi-brand management requires distinct editorial identities per channel to avoid audience cannibalization

formula-e-community.title: Community Building for Formula E: 7% Engagement
formula-e-community.description: Digital and community strategy for the global Formula E championship in Brazil, building local presence for a high-impact international brand entering a new market.
formula-e-community.challenge: Establish a local digital presence and build community relationships for a global championship arriving in Brazil for the first time, with no established fan base.
formula-e-community.solution: Built the digital and community strategy from scratch: positioning, community guidelines, crisis management protocols, always-on content planning, and real-time coverage through content and influencers.
insights: Consistent community building outperforms one-off campaigns in long-term engagement
Real-time event activation requires robust crisis protocols and fast decision-making
Well-leveraged native platform tools can drive significant conversion in ticket sales

budweiser-fifa-influencer.title: Influencer Marketing at Scale: 75M Reach for FIFA
budweiser-fifa-influencer.description: Influencer marketing strategy for Budweiser's FIFA Club World Cup activation, combining scale, authenticity, and performance through a diversified creator ecosystem.
budweiser-fifa-influencer.challenge: Activate a global sports event with massive cultural relevance, ensuring strong brand presence across digital platforms while balancing scale, authenticity, and performance — without feeling forced or generic.
budweiser-fifa-influencer.solution: Led the influencer marketing strategy with a diversified creator ecosystem: macro influencers for amplification, mid-tier for authentic storytelling, and community creators for engagement. Oversaw selection, briefing, co-creation, and real-time activation.
insights: Diversified creator ecosystems — macro + mid-tier — deliver scale without sacrificing authenticity
Differentiated creator roles (amplification, storytelling, engagement) optimize each profile's output
Real-time activation at event peaks is where brand visibility is truly consolidated

betfair-always-on.title: Always-On Strategy for Betfair: 7.5% Engagement
betfair-always-on.description: Always-on influencer marketing strategy for Betfair, master sponsor of Vasco da Gama and Cruzeiro, transforming sponsorship into continuous cultural presence inside fan communities.
betfair-always-on.challenge: In a highly competitive sports betting market, Betfair needed to go beyond logo exposure and transform its sponsorship into genuine cultural presence — speaking the language of supporters, not corporate marketing.
betfair-always-on.solution: Developed an always-on strategy with niche creator squads deeply embedded in each club's fan culture. The approach combined platform-native content, editorial alignment with the football calendar, and real-time performance monitoring via a Power BI dashboard.
insights: Niche communities deliver more authentic engagement than mass reach campaigns
Creators culturally embedded in the fan base produce content that doesn't feel like advertising
Data-driven optimization (Power BI) ensures sustained performance instead of isolated spikes
